subcodes.first_line: O my God and my Lord! Thou seest my attachment to Thy most glorious Kingdom, my yearning to ascend unto Thy most exalted Threshold, and my ardent desire [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی و ربی تری تعلقی بملکوتک الابهی و تشوقی للصعود الی عتبتک العلیا و تشوفی
subcodes.subjects: @expressions of grief; lamentation; sadness, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @prayer for protection, @Covenant-breaking and Covenant-breakers, @prayer for the spiritual progress of others
